name: Scheme Performance
description: Execution-layer metadata for a scheme benefit delivery: delivery type, submission mode, document collection, agent assignment, and application lifecycle status.
privacy_notes: spe:agentDetails contains the agent's name and mobile number — treat as professional contact data, not applicant PII.
spe:applicationPortalReference is a portal reference — do not expose in public indices.
Core Performance.beckn:customer fields (name, phone) are applicant PII — handle per DPDP Act 2023.
